name: Gurth Ironbellow
sd_appearance: A towering, heavily muscled half-orc with scarred features, greenish skin, and piercing ice blue eyes wields a warhammer and crossbow, his worn leather and chainmail attire adorned with the Adventurers Guild badge. His tusks glint beneath the dim tavern light as he stands sentinel at The Rusty Axe, his eyes reflecting a fierce determination to prove his worth as an adventurer, yearning for respect from his peers.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
